# Koivu Labs

> A Finnish Software Studio focused on AI-driven utility. Bridging human common sense with AI power.

Koivu Labs is an independent software studio founded in 2026 in Saarijärvi, Finland. The studio builds pragmatic, AI-first digital tools designed to solve real problems with minimal friction.

## Studio

- **Founded:** 2026
- **Location:** Saarijärvi, Finland
- **Philosophy:** Pragmatic Intelligence — Nordic precision meets modern AI capability
- **Contact:** hello@koivulabs.com

## Products & Services

### KoivuChat — AI Chatbot for Finnish Businesses

KoivuChat is a fully managed AI customer service chatbot for Finnish SMEs. It learns from the client's own documents and website, and answers customer questions 24/7 in Finnish. Ready within 48 hours.

**Key features:**
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) — answers based only on the client's own knowledge base
- PDF upload and automatic website crawl (sitemap-based, up to 50 pages)
- Full branding customization: bot name, avatar, color, quick replies
- Lead capture form embedded in chat
- Analytics dashboard with full conversation history
- One-line JavaScript embed — works on any platform (WordPress, Webflow, Next.js, HTML)
- EU data (Google Cloud europe-west3), GDPR compliant
- Admin panel for managing knowledge base, branding, and usage quotas

**Pricing (EUR, VAT 0%):**
- Startti (Starter): 49€/month + 499€ setup — 200 messages/month, 3 knowledge sources, basic branding
- Kasvu (Growth): 99€/month + 799€ setup — 1,000 messages/month, unlimited sources, full branding, lead capture
- Pro: 199€/month + 1,490€ setup — 5,000 messages/month, 3 bots, white-label, SLA support
- Annual billing saves ~20%. Contracts are 1 year, upgradeable anytime.
- Bundle: Website + KoivuChat — 990€ setup + 49€/month

**Target audience:** Finnish small and medium businesses — restaurants, retail, e-commerce, real estate, service companies.

**Contact for KoivuChat:** hello@koivulabs.com | Subject: "KoivuChat — haluan aloittaa"

## Projects

- **BrainBuffer** — Thought capture at the speed of light. Minimalist tool for instant idea preservation.
- **Human Dashboard** — Central OS for life and projects. Everything manageable in one sophisticated view.
- **Vuoto** — Financial tracking and receipt management. Stop your money from leaking.
- **JobBot** — Intelligent tool for job seeking and career management.
- **Vibe Checker** — Analysis of social energy and vibes for optimized interaction.
- **Vibe Coder** — Tool for utilizing the "vibe coding" method in modern development.
- **MPM** — Multi-Project Manager. Early coding experiments in project organization.
